<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 qbitOS / ugrad.ai. All rights reserved.
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
-->

# qbitos{mu.eee} Compliance Baseline

## Compliance Root

- Canonical policy: https://github.com/qbitOS/compliance

## Runtime Path

`uvspeed web/mueee.html` → Tonnetz spine (`mueee-throughline-spine.js`) → `BroadcastChannel('mueee-throughline')` + iframe `postMessage` → child PWAs (Search, History, …) → Iron Line layers per embedded app.

## Control Envelope

`Single shell / no duplicate app navigators / spine order normative / theme sync only loaded iframes / query-preserving freya-units pattern for Freya bridge`
